summary: Category Config UI testing complete. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: category cards display badges correctly, expand/collapse works, dropdowns and toggles functional, Save Changes persists via API with success toast.

minor.issue: FIXED: updated_fields was returning all payload keys instead of only allowed fields that were actually updated

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/catalog-workspace/stats correctly returns categories with display_mode, commercial_mode, sourcing_mode fields
PUT /api/admin/catalog-workspace/categories/{cat_name} correctly validates allowed fields and returns ok:true with updated_fields list
PUT endpoint returns 404 for non-existent category
Case-insensitive category name matching works correctly
Frontend CategoryConfigCard component correctly displays badges (Visual/List & Quote, Fixed Price/Request Quote/Hybrid, Single Vendor/Competitive)
Expanded view shows Core Settings (3 dropdowns) and Advanced Settings (5 toggles) with helper text
Save Changes button appears when changes are made and persists config via API with success toast
context_for_next_testing_agent: Category Config UI fully functional. Categories stored in admin_settings collection under key 'settings_hub' -> value.catalog.product_categories. Legacy string categories are normalized to rich objects with defaults. Admin login uses /api/admin/auth/login endpoint.

backend_api_tests: Stats response contains categories array - PASSED
Categories have display_mode, commercial_mode, sourcing_mode fields - PASSED
Stats contains KPI fields (products, active_products, category_count, etc.) - PASSED
PUT changes persist in settings (verified via GET) - PASSED
PUT to non-existent category returns 404 - PASSED
PUT ignores invalid fields not in allowed_fields - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: Catalog Workspace page loads at /admin/catalog - VERIFIED
KPI strip shows Categories, Products, Active, Pending Review, Pricing Issues, Quote Items - VERIFIED
Category cards display with badges (Visual/List & Quote, Fixed Price/Request Quote/Hybrid, Single Vendor/Competitive) - VERIFIED
Clicking category card expands it showing Core Settings and Advanced Settings - VERIFIED
Core Settings has 3 dropdowns: Display Mode, Commercial Mode, Sourcing Mode with helper text - VERIFIED
Advanced Settings has 5 toggles: Allow Custom Items, Require Description, Show Price in List, Multi-item Request, Search-first Mode with helper text - VERIFIED
Save Changes button appears when changes made - VERIFIED
Save Changes persists config via API and shows success toast - VERIFIED

get_catalog_stats.details: Returns categories with display_mode, commercial_mode, sourcing_mode, product_count and KPI fields

put_category_config.details: Updates category config, validates allowed fields, returns ok:true with updated_fields list, 404 for non-existent

frontend_category_config_ui.details: Category cards with badges, expandable with dropdowns/toggles, Save Changes persists via API

bug_fix_applied.issue: updated_fields was returning list(payload.keys()) instead of only fields that were actually updated
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed to track updated_fields list and only append fields that are in allowed_fields
